progress_summary: Pre-commit gate for the opchain MCP server (v1.6 Codex port, first increment). Changed surface: src/lib/mcp/{server,routing}.js, scripts/gen-mcp-catalog.mjs + src/generated/mcp-catalog.json, the POST /mcp Worker route + site.ops.api-mcp.kill flag, mcp/local-server.mjs + mcp/README.md, and tests/mcp-{server,route}.test.js. Verdict PASS — vitest 345/345 (incl. 32 new MCP tests), worker esbuild bundle clean with the new JSON import, anti-pattern + secret scans clean, npm audit 0 vulnerabilities. Type-check + lint are N/A for the plain-JS Worker (no root tsconfig/eslint — the site uses astro check separately).
next_actions: Continue the v1.6 port: install-page Codex/MCP flow + platform-neutral site copy.
Hold the lockstep version bump + changelog entry until v1.5 ships (this lands as v1.6).
